description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a dense border of trees, creating a private and enclosed yard. The structure features a modern, low-pitched roof with multiple sections and a combination of flat and slightly sloped surfaces. The front of the house includes a covered porch area with steps leading up from a paved walkway, and the driveway connects directly to the street. The exterior is finished with a mix of neutral tones, likely concrete or stucco, and large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The landscaping is meticulously arranged, with trees forming a rectangular perimeter and open grassy areas within. The overall design emphasizes privacy, accessibility, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a low-pitched roof, surrounded by a dense border of trees and featuring a covered front porch and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical tree-lined yard facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side windows, and the continuous tree border along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the enclosed yard formed by the trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance area, side yard, and the tree-lined boundary adjacent to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
